g.text: Relationship cardinalities corrected by LLM review
Reason: Admin is a type of Actor, not Permission. Inheritance from Actor is correct.
Reason: Each bonus nugget grant must be logged as an audit event, so a 1-to-1 directed association is more appropriate than a dependency with cardinalities.
Reason: The UI depends on the Instructor model, not the other way around. Dependency direction should be from UI to domain class.
Reason: The configuration system likely depends on an Interface, not inherits from it. Changing to dependency.
Reason: A student owns a nugget balance; the association should originate from Student to NuggetBalance.
Reason: An actor (e.g., Instructor) can own multiple resources; the composition was reversed. Changing to directed association with correct cardinality.
Reason: A schedule must have exactly two dates (open and close), so composition with multiplicity 2 is appropriate.
Reason: A student profile can have multiple badges, so multiplicity should be many (0..* or *). Adding explicit multiplicity.
[missing_relationship] Task #106 requires class ExamBuilder, but it is missing from the class list.
[missing_relationship] Task #113 requires classes CompetencyBreakdown and StudyTip, but they are missing.
[missing_relationship] Task #114 requires classes RewardStore, RewardItem, and Redemption, but they are missing.
[missing_relationship] Task #116 requires classes AttemptReview and CompetencyTrendChart, but they are missing.
[missing_relationship] Task #105 requires class InstructorDashboard, but it is missing.
[duplicate_concept] Player and Student represent the same concept; Player should be merged into Student or removed.
[duplicate_concept] Teacher and Instructor represent the same role; Teacher should be merged into Instructor.
[duplicate_concept] BonusNugget and BonusNuggetGrant (from Task #109) are the same; rename BonusNugget to BonusNuggetGrant or merge.
[other_correction] Student has both a composition relationship and a directed association to NuggetWallet; this is redundant and should be unified.
[rename_for_clarity] Rename Player to Student to\nalign with ubiquitous language from tasks.
[rename_for_clarity] Rename Teacher to\nInstructor to match task descriptions.
[rename_for_clarity] Rename BonusNugget to\nBonusNuggetGrant to match Task #109.

[introduce_value_object] Introduce a value
object DifficultyTier (enum: Beginner,
Intermediate, Advanced) to replace the primitive
attribute on Question.
[introduce_value_object] Introduce a value\nobject NuggetMultiplier to encapsulate the\nmultiplier logic (1x, 1.5x, 2x, 3x).

[general] Consider removing generic or
infrastructural classes (State, Permission,
Resource, Actor, Interface, User_Database,
REQ_*) from the domain model if they are not
core to the business logic, to keep the model
focused.
